title: Titan craft
description: Titan craft is a mod that adds titanium and various other materials.
body: Titan Craft is a mod that adds titanium and other materials. This is my first mod. I tried to make a good, high-quality mod, but it may contain some bugs. I really hope you like it. It adds a titanium biome and a new mob. ![biom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35efa3fd2de363c897171087eb68e1a9fc75d6d4.jpeg) It has quite a lot of health, but it's small and hard to hit. There are also titanium items ![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4d0009000f814743ca2494018edf3a00be18bf1.jpeg) , and titanium ore is very rare and hard to find ![Titanium ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8ebdaf0857bad57f42111628da7891c49ca7a1a.jpeg) . The mod also adds two structures: one underground and one aboveground, where you can have a small chance of finding titanium ingots or other items.
